name: ShenZhen RoadRover Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: ShenZhen RoadRover Technology Co.,Ltd provides automotive electronic products and solutions for car manufacturers worldwide. The company offers in-vehicle infotainment systems; car audio solutions; power tailgate systems; digital multifunctional instrument panels; smart seating systems; Internet of vehicles; and telematics solutions. It also provides advanced driver assistance systems, HD digital video recorders for cars, tire pressure monitoring systems, smart rear view mirror systems, parking sensors, head-up displays, headrest entertainment systems, and camera systems. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Roadrover Technology Limited and changed its name to ShenZhen RoadRover Technology Co.,Ltd in March 2012. ShenZhen RoadRover Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
